description_long: This awning features a large, flat, rectangular canopy with a smooth, solid surface, likely made from metal or a weather-resistant composite. The canopy is supported by a visible framework of slender metal posts and diagonal braces, providing stability and rigidity. The underside reveals a wooden or wood-like substructure, adding both strength and a touch of visual warmth. The edges of the canopy are straight and unadorned, giving the awning a modern, utilitarian appearance. The support structure is minimalistic, with no visible mechanisms for retraction or adjustment, suggesting a fixed installation. There is no visible branding, signage, or decorative trim, emphasizing its functional, industrial design.
description: A modern, flat-topped awning with a smooth, solid canopy supported by metal posts and wooden braces, featuring a clean, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the flat canopy, supported by three slender metal posts and visible diagonal wooden braces underneath.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the canopy and the structural support beams beneath, with two posts visible.
description_view_2: Direct top-down view displaying the full rectangular expanse of the canopy and the symmetrical arrangement of the support posts.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the underside bracing and the clean, straight edge of the canopy.
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with vertical posts and diagonal braces
